title: 9ft Banner Happy 14th Birthday Blue Holographic Age 14
features: FOR A BIG DAY -- Jazz your home for a big day!

INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE -- Made of durable long-lasting material this banner can be used both indoors and outdoors. Looks fantastic as a window decoration when the sunlight is catched by holographic reflections.
VERSATILE -- Can be used as one 2.7m banner or split into 3 smaller banners as the text is repeated 3 times.
Package contents: 9ft Happy 14th Birthday Blue Holographic Banner x1, Envelope x1. Actual packaging may vary. The real color may be slightly different from the pictures.
description: This holographic 9ft blue banner is perfect for the 14th birthday party. It can be used both indoors and outdoors as the material is strong and durable. Holographic printing looks fantastic when it catches the sunlight, so the banner is a great choice for window decoration. Use it as one long banner or split into three parts - the text is repeated three times. Kindly note that items may slightly vary from the image. The banner is supplied in an envelope.
